series_metadata.series_description: The ODNR Office of Coastal Management maintains files related to applications for grants that were selected for funding. These files include general grant award information and may include grant applications and guidance documents; grant selection summaries; interim and final reimbursement requests, federal financial reports; semi- annual performance reports; correspondence; project administration paperwork; deliverables and interim reporting; and bid documents, requests for proposals, requests for qualifications or similar documents related to purchasing, and personnel services.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Six (6) years start of grant cycle or three (3) years start of grant cycle if an electronic copy is available. If litigation, claim, or audit, is initiated ; Electronic: Six (6) years start of grant cycle. If litigation, claim, or audit, is initiated
